## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Linked Work Items

- Story/Issue:
- ADR (if applicable):

## Change Type

- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Infrastructure

## Checklist

- [ ] Acceptance criteria are met.
- [ ] Documentation is updated.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where needed.
- [ ] No business logic was added to controllers.
- [ ] API changes are reflected in `docs/api/openapi-v1.yaml`.
- [ ] UI colors use semantic tokens from `docs/design/tokens-v1.json`.
- [ ] Security impact reviewed against `docs/7-security-baseline.md`.

## Validation

List commands, checks, and evidence used to validate this change.

## Notes For Reviewers

Call out anything that needs extra attention.
